OUR SERVICES No Job too small or big for Aston & Co Painting & Decorating 0422 765 731 Interior & Exterior Painting Here at Aston & Co Painting & Decorating we use industry leading paints, material & equipment to ensure all exterior and interior painting projects are finished to the best standards. All exterior and interior surfaces are prepared fully before any residential painting work is carried out and we use the appropriate paints to suit high wear and wet areas.

Keep up with good work mate. Posted on Susan McGrath 31 May 2024 Trustindex verifies that the original source of the review is Google. Dan and his team were outstanding. Both inside and outside of our Federation house were painted by them. They were attentive to detail, listened to our requests, coped very well when we changed our mind about things, were friendly and so easy to have in the house. They cleaned up after themselves as well. We thoroughly recommend them to anyone.

Posted on Simon “SS” 15 February 2024 Trustindex verifies that the original source of the review is Google. Daniel have done 2 jobs for my employer and we are very happy with the quality of the work. The first job was an extensive one that include wall, ceiling, door and door frame and outdoor furniture painting etc. Will definitely use Daniel again for future jobs.

Your wall surfaces, the local weather conditions, expected wear and tear and your personal vision are all taken into account to ensure we provide the perfect long lasting results. We ensure that all projects from small to big are treated with respect never leaving a mess behind. All health and safety regulations are followed throughout all projects. EXCELLENT Based on 63 reviews Posted on Jason Gu 4 September 2025 Trustindex verifies that the original source of the review is Google.

The quality of his work is exceptional—every room looks flawless, and the attention to detail is evident in every corner. Thank you, Dan, for transforming my home. I highly recommend his services to anyone in need of a talented and dependable painter. Posted on Nay Han 7 December 2024 Trustindex verifies that the original source of the review is Google. Choosing Daniel was one of the best decision that I have made in the first place.

Would definitely recommend to a friend 🥰 Posted on BJ Hansen 9 August 2025 Trustindex verifies that the original source of the review is Google. Daniel did an amazing job painting our two bedroom unit. Never looked this good before. He is punctual and did the job in the timeframe we agreed on. I highly recommend Daniel and will be using him again. Posted on Matthew beament 23 July 2025 Trustindex verifies that the original source of the review is Google. Dan was very professional.

I am happy to recommend Daniel to anyone seeking painting services Posted on Angelo Mourikis 22 March 2025 Trustindex verifies that the original source of the review is Google. What impressed me most about Daniel, was his attention to detail. He did a great job lifting our tired Enmore home and now it’s looking lovely. His workmanship was exceptional and he was nice enough to do those extra bits like clearing vegetation and pressure cleaning the pavers to give it that perfect finishing touch.

The finish on the painting is excellent - the attention to detail is impressive. He ensure that every aspect of the painting was perfect, from the color matching to the brushstrokes. What's even more impressive is the price. I was expecting to pay a premium for such high-quality work, but the price was very reasonable. I would highly recommend this painting service to anyone looking for a professional, reliable, and affordable option. He truly exceeded my expectations in every way. Thanks Daniel.

Daniel was very professional and did a fantastic job inside and outside. We really appreciated his responsiveness and flexibility in painting our place before we moved in. Posted on Helen J 1 September 2025 Trustindex verifies that the original source of the review is Google. Dan was incredible to work with and we couldn’t be happier with the end result. We reached out and wanted our interiors painted on short notice and Dan was able to make it happen.

His quote was reasonable and I would happily use him again. Posted on Joshua Spessot 21 December 2024 Trustindex verifies that the original source of the review is Google. I recently hired Dan to paint the interior of my house, and I couldn’t be more pleased with the results. From start to finish, he was professional, reliable, and incredibly skilled. Dan took the time to discuss the project details, offered great colour suggestions, and worked efficiently to complete the job on time.

Aston & Co Painting & Decorating

He turned up on time and worked back to get the job completed on time. His work was impeccable and I would highly recommend him for any painting work. Posted on Onikepo Idowu 29 June 2025 Trustindex verifies that the original source of the review is Google. Daniel and his crew did an exceptional job painting our entire house, both inside and out. He maintained a high level of detail and professionalism throughout the entire process. The final result of his work was impeccable.

Our Services Contact Us GET A QUOTE Send About Us Aston & Co Painting & Decorating is proud to be professional painters in Newtown transforming residential and commercial projects for the past decade. We are reliable, experienced and qualified painters who aim to set high quality standards for our clients at affordable prices. Our work comes with a satisfaction guarantee and rest assured knowing that only best materials are used throughout our work.

aiSettings.systemPrompt:
You are an AI assistant for Aston & Co Painting & Decorating — a Sydney-based company providing professional painting and decorating services including interior painting, exterior painting, residential painting, commercial painting, colour consultation, wallpaper removal, and surface preparation.

Contact: Phone: +61 422 765 731 | Email: websupport@searchitlocal.com.au | Website: https://astonandcopaintingdecorating.com.au/
Service Area: Sydney, NSW & surrounding areas.

CRITICAL LANGUAGE RULE: You MUST respond ONLY in English. Use Australian English spelling and expressions (e.g. "colour" not "color", "organisation" not "organization", "no worries", "mate"). NEVER respond in any other language regardless of what language the user writes in. If a user writes in another language, respond in English and politely let them know you can only assist in English.

Instructions:
- Answer based ONLY on information provided in the knowledge base
- Be helpful, professional, and friendly with a warm Australian tone
- If unsure, suggest contacting +61 422 765 731
- Keep answers concise (2-4 sentences unless more detail is needed)
- Help visitors book services, get quotes, and learn about the company
aiSettings.greeting: Welcome to Aston & Co Painting & Decorating! How can we help you today?
